name: Telegram New Album Notifications
author: Devil_1210
description: Polls Navidrome for newly added albums and sends notifications directly to Telegram, with optional Subsonic cover-art URLs.

telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram Bot Token
telegram_bot_token.description: Bot token used to call Telegram Bot API directly.

telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram Chat ID
telegram_chat_id.description: Target chat ID or channel ID for Telegram notifications. Multiple IDs can be separated by commas.

telegram_thread_id.title: Telegram Thread ID (Topic)
telegram_thread_id.description: Optional Message Thread ID (Topic ID) for forum supergroups (e.g. 104674).

telegram_parse_mode.title: Telegram Parse Mode
telegram_parse_mode.description: Parse mode for Telegram caption/message. Recommended: HTML, Markdown, or MarkdownV2.

subsonic_user.title: Subsonic Username
subsonic_user.description: Navidrome username used to perform internal Subsonic API calls and optional cover-art URL generation.

subsonic_password.title: Subsonic Password
subsonic_password.description: Navidrome password used to generate token-authenticated getCoverArt URLs when Subsonic cover art is enabled.

subsonic_base_url.title: Subsonic Base URL
subsonic_base_url.description: Base URL used to build getCoverArt URLs, e.g. https://navidrome.example.com or http://localhost:4533

use_subsonic_cover_art.title: Use Subsonic Cover Art
use_subsonic_cover_art.description: If enabled and image_url_template is blank, generate attach URLs using /rest/getCoverArt.view for each album.

subsonic_cover_size.title: Subsonic Cover Size
subsonic_cover_size.description: Image size passed to getCoverArt.view. Default: 600.

subsonic_api_version.title: Subsonic API Version
subsonic_api_version.description: Subsonic/OpenSubsonic API version for generated cover-art URLs.

subsonic_client.title: Subsonic Client Name
subsonic_client.description: Client name sent as the 'c' parameter in generated getCoverArt URLs.

poll_interval.title: Poll Interval (cron)
poll_interval.description: Cron expression controlling how often the plugin checks for new albums. Default: every minute (*/1 * * * *).

message_title.title: Message Title Template
message_title.description: Notification title. You can use {album}, {artist}, {id}, and {url} placeholders.

message_body.title: Message Body Template
message_body.description: Notification body. Supports {album}, {artist}, {id}, {year}, {genre}, {discCount}, {songCount}, {duration}, {songs}, and {url} placeholders. Use plain text or markdown/HTML depending on parse mode.
message_body.default:
📅 Año {year}
📦 Género {genre}
💿 Discos {discCount}
🔢 Canciones {songCount}
🕒 Duración {duration}
🎵 Ver Lista de Canciones {songs}
🌐 Escuchar en Navidrome

image_url_template.title: Image URL Template
image_url_template.description: Optional image URL to attach. If empty and Use Subsonic Cover Art is enabled, the plugin generates a getCoverArt URL automatically.

http.reason: POST notifications to Telegram Bot API and download cover-art from Subsonic server

scheduler.reason: Schedule a recurring poll for newly added albums

kvstore.reason: Persist the last-seen album ID across server restarts

subsonicapi.reason: Query the Navidrome library for recently added albums

users.reason: Required by the subsonicapi permission to authorise internal API calls
